text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking through the halls on the<n>way back to
my office, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Uniqueness, uniqueness... Hmm. I've<n>thought
about it so much I'm starting<n>to get all confused.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You're still on this uniquenessthing? I can't believe you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah... No one's gonna<n>remember a normal
Umamusume like<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't be like that... But if it's<n>uniqueness you
want, why not talk to<n>her?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, it came to me. Who<n>needs
stairs in this day and age when<n>you could have
slides?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Right! Time to do us some DIY!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Now that is unique! I canreally learn something here!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what—No! I was joking! Unique<n>doesn't
even cover it with her—she's<n>nuts!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Look closer! She's getting chased by<n>Air
Groove! And Air Groove looks<n>reeeally mad!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Her uniqueness really must be<n>off the
charts!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh boy. She's completely off in herown world. Sigh... Guess I'll justhave to lean into it...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, listen. There's no way you can<n>measure
up to Golshi's prank level.<n>She's a regular
prankster queen.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna take inspiration from<n>her, I'd
suggest starting with some<n>regular pranks.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I can't do pranks, Nature. Pranks are<n>bad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the sensible answer. But<n>you're
trying to be like Golshi, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Y-you're right... But I don't want<n>to cause
trouble for anyone or<n>damage anything...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, in that case, why don't you getsome help from that person who'sbeen listening in on us? ...That's okaywith you, right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, will you really help?! Thank youso, so much!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Swept up by her enthusiasm, I find<n>myself going
along with<n>Matikanetannhauser's pranks...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I am the prankster<n>Matikanetannhauser.
Now, let the<n>pranking commence!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Uh, would you mind closing your<n>eyes? I'm
planning to doodle on your<n>face...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aaand she's explaining the prank<n>before she
does it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'll just do this here and that there<n>and... Done!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Drawing eyes on someone's<n>eyelids... a
classic... Pfft, ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whew! It turned out great!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew... What a riot. Hold on though...<n>Why did you
go all in like that? I mean,<n>look at all the lashes
you drew.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I used a water-based marker, so it'll<n>come off
easily. But just to be safe,<n>be sure to wash it off
soon, okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for helping me out! I think I<n>might just
turn into a prank master at<n>this rate!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yep, for sure.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hm... wait. Does a single prank really<n>make me
any more unique?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't, right? I just asked<n>someone if I could
doodle on their<n>face, then did it. That's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I should have realized before I<n>did my
prank! This didn't help at all!<n>I'm still so normal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Normal by your standards, maybe.<n>But is that
such a bad thing?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You mean no matter what I do,I'll always just be boring, normal oldme?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I've been trying sooo hard...<n>Can't I catch a
break, just once?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I think you're plenty<n>interesting juuust
the way you are.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser might be a little<n>off-kilter,
but she's always<n>straightforward when it comes
to<n>pursuing her goals.
